api_key.description: CoinAPI key, sent as the X-CoinAPI-Key request header. Used only for auth; never logged.

base_url.description: CoinAPI base URL override for tests or proxies. When unset, environment selects the production or sandbox CoinAPI host.

environment.description: Selects the CoinAPI host when base_url is not set: production (https://rest.coinapi.io) or sandbox (https://rest-sandbox.coinapi.io).

symbol_id.description: CoinAPI symbol identifier (e.g. BITSTAMP_SPOT_BTC_USD), required for the ohlcv_historical_data, trades_historical_data, quotes_current, and orderbook_current streams.

period.description: CoinAPI OHLCV period identifier (e.g. 1DAY), required for the ohlcv_historical_data stream.

start_date.description: ISO-8601 lower bound for historical streams; only records at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

end_date.description: Optional ISO-8601 upper bound (time_end) for historical streams.

limit.description: Records per page for historical streams (1-100000).

exchange_id.description: CoinAPI exchange identifier (e.g. BITSTAMP), required for the symbols stream. CoinAPI retired the bare all-exchanges GET /v1/symbols listing; symbols are now listed per-exchange via GET /v1/symbols/{exchange_id}/active.

asset_id_base.description: CoinAPI base asset identifier (e.g. BTC), required for the exchange_rates stream.
